The Operating System for Travel Agencies

Book globally.
Scale effortlessly.

The ultimate B2B platform for elite travel agents. Access robust wholesale inventory and manage your client itineraries dynamically.

Join Flybeth Network

Live Inventory

7G Global Sync

Powering Elite Agents Through Industry Leaders

AmadeusSabreTravelportDuffelHotelBedsExpedia TAAP

Smart Itinerary Construction.

Say goodbye to manual dates and rigid templates. Our custom Itinerary Builder features intelligent time-selectors, native Google Maps Autocomplete integration, and dynamic Day-by-Day blocks to craft compelling stories for your travelers instantly.

  • Intelligent Day-by-Day routing
  • Google Places API Autocomplete
  • Bespoke custom time selectors

Agency-Level Operations Terminal.

Manage hundreds of travelers without missing a beat. Our wildly robust Communications Terminal brings WhatsApp-styled messaging directly into your workflow. Handle secure chats, active calls, and cross-team routing instantly.

  • End-to-End Encrypted Support Line
  • Familiar, aggressive WhatsApp-style UI
  • 100% Mobile Responsive operations

The Core Advantage

Why leading agents switch to Flybeth

Uncapped Margins

Bypass retail platforms. We provide true B2B wholesale access across flights, stays, cruises, and custom packages—allowing you to set custom markups securely.

Aggressive Custom Tech

No laggy dropdowns or janky iFrames. Flybeth utilizes deeply custom-engineered frameworks, providing instantaneous search mapping and data retrieval natively.

Unrivaled Client Optics

Publish breathtaking consumer-facing itineraries that link directly with their Flybeth consumer app, giving your clients extreme confidence in your agency.

Ready to scale?

Power your agency.
Without the overhead.

The top tier of travel operations awaits. Start building robust itineraries, offering wholesale prices, and supporting your clients via the most advanced portal on the market.
